briefdescription.para: This function reads a single byte to the IDT 8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the IDT 8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value, u8 Mask)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_ModifyRegister

briefdescription.para: This function modifies a single byte to the IDT 8T49N24x.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the IDT 8T49N24x device ID.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the settings.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, int FIn, int FOut, u8 FreeRun)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetClock

briefdescription.para: This function calculates and sets the IDT 8TN49N24x device with the given clock configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

specifies if the operation mode is locked/synthesizer mode.
TRUE Synthesizer mode (Fout only)
FALSE Locked mode (Fout locked to Fin)

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE I2C write error or incorrect parameters detected.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Input)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_PreDivider

briefdescription.para: This function set the pre-divider.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Input)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_M1Feedback

briefdescription.para: This function set the M1 feedback.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function set the DSM integer.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function set the DSM fractional.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Output)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_OutputDividerInteger

briefdescription.para: This function set the Output divider integer.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u32 Value, u8 Output)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_OutputDividerFractional

briefdescription.para: This function set the Output divider fractional.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the mode (jitter attenuator / synthesizer)

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Input, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_ReferenceInput

briefdescription.para: This function sets disables / enables the reference inputs.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function enables/disables the DPLL and APLL calibration.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function set the GPIO outputs.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function set the input reference.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 Output, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_OutputDriver

briefdescription.para: This function set the output drivers.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the lock mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the IDT 8TN49N24x with default values for use with the Video FMC.

detaileddescription.para: This function set the GPIO outputs.

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS Initialization was successful.
XST_FAILURE I2C write error.
None.
I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function set the input reference

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function set the output drivers

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function sets the lock mode

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
XST_SUCCESS
XST_FAILURE
None. This function initializes the IDT 8TN49N24x with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function the IDT 8TN49N24x device with the data from the configuration table.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the IDT 8TN49N24x device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 PortID, u8 Set)
memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetGPOut

briefdescription.para: Device Revision.
Device ID Code.
The frequency of the crystal in Hz.
Maximum VCO Operating Frequency in Hz.
Minimum VCO Operating Frequency in Hz.
Maximum Output Frequency in Hz.
Minimum Output Frequency in Hz.
Maximum Input Frequency in Hz.
Minimum Input Frequency in Hz.
Maximum Phase Detector Frequency in Hz.
Minimum Phase Detector Frequency in Hz.
Maximum P divider value.
Maximum M multiplier value.

Maximum P divider value.
Maximum M multiplier value.
